title: Phantasmal Gardener

moves.title: Enlarge
effects: Grow larger (scale increases logarithmically with each Enlarge)

move_pattern: Starting move depends on slot: first slot starts with Flail, second with Bite, third with Lash, fourth with Enlarge. Cycle: Bite -> Lash -> Flail -> Enlarge -> Bite (repeating)
notes: Grows physically larger each time Enlarge is used (scale = 1 + 0.1 * log(enlargeCount + 1)). Has different visual skins for tall (first/third slots) and short (second/fourth slots). Skittish power causes a different hurt animation when block has been gained this turn.
